    Public Class HiResTimer

        Private isPerfCounterSupported As Boolean = False
        Private timerFrequency As Int64 = 0
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceCounter Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceFrequency Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short

        Public Sub New()
            Dim returnVal As Integer = QueryPerformanceFrequency(timerFrequency)
            If returnVal <> 0 AndAlso timerFrequency <> 1000 Then
                isPerfCounterSupported = True
            Else
                timerFrequency = 1000
            End If
        End Sub

        Public ReadOnly Property Frequency() As Int64
            Get
                Return timerFrequency
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property Value() As Int64
            Get
                Dim tickCount As Int64 = 0

                If isPerfCounterSupported Then
                    QueryPerformanceCounter(tickCount)
                    Return tickCount
                Else
                    Return CType(Environment.TickCount, Int64)
                End If
            End Get
        End Property

    End Class

    Public Function Hex2Bin(ByVal sHex As String) As String
        Dim sBin As String
        sBin = ""
        If Len(sHex) > 2 Then
            sHex = UCase(sHex)
            If Left(sHex, 2) = "&H" Then
                Dim iHex As Integer, jHex As Integer
                Dim cHex As String
                Dim HBi As Integer
                Dim HBin As String
                sHex = Mid(sHex, 3)
                For HBi = 1 To Len(sHex)
                    cHex = Mid(sHex, HBi, 1)
                    Select Case cHex
                        Case "A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"
                            iHex = Asc(cHex) - 55
                        Case Else
                            iHex = Val(cHex)
                    End Select
                    HBin = ""
                    jHex = 8
                    For HBj = 1 To 4
                        If iHex >= jHex Then
                            HBin = HBin & "1"
                            iHex = iHex - jHex
                        Else
                            HBin = HBin & "0"
                        End If
                        jHex = jHex / 2
                    Next
                    sBin = sBin & HBin
                Next
            End If
        End If
        Return sBin
    End Function

    Public Function Bin2Hex(ByVal sBin As String)
        Dim sHex As String
        Dim lenBin As Integer
        sHex = ""
        lenBin = Len(sBin)
        If lenBin > 0 Then
            Dim splitLen As Integer
            Dim splitBin As String
            Dim iBin As Integer
            Dim jBin As Integer
            If lenBin Mod 4 <> 0 Then
                For BHi = 1 To 4 - (lenBin Mod 4)
                    sBin = "0" & sBin
                Next
            End If
            lenBin = Len(sBin)
            splitLen = lenBin / 4
            For BHi = 1 To splitLen
                splitBin = Mid(sBin, ((BHi - 1) * 4) + 1, 4)
                jBin = 8
                iBin = 0
                For BHj = 1 To 4
                    If Mid(splitBin, BHj, 1) = "1" Then
                        iBin = iBin + jBin
                    End If
                    jBin = jBin / 2
                Next
                sHex = sHex & Hex(iBin)
            Next
        End If
        Return sHex

    End Function

End Module

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
        hexv = ""
        Do While DecNum > 0
            na = DecNum Mod 16
            Select Case na
                Case 10
                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 11
                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 12
                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 13
                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 14
                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 15
                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                Case Else
                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
            End Select
            If DecNum >= 16 Then
                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
            Else
                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop
        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
        Else
            Dec2Hex = hexv
        End If
        If DecNum = 0 Then
            Dec2Hex = "00"
        End If
    End Function

    Public Function NullCheck(ByVal strVal) As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Try
            tmp = strVal
        Catch ex As Exception
            tmp = ""
        End Try
        Return tmp
    End Function

    Public Function Asc2PrinterStr(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        If Len(str) > 2 Then
            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(str)
                If Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 4 Then 'EOT
                    tmp = tmp & EOT
                ElseIf Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 30 Then 'RS
                    tmp = tmp & RS
                ElseIf Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 29 Then 'GS
                    tmp = tmp & GS
                Else
                    tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
                End If
            Next
        Else
        End If
        If tmp = "" Then
        Else
            tmp = "#" & tmp
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Public Sub WriteLog(ByVal strMsg As String, ByVal strType As String)

        Dim flagSave = True
        Dim tmpLogFolder As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
        Dim Tmpdtp As String = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & vbTab
        Dim SaveStep As Integer = 0

        Do
            Try
                If SaveStep = 0 Then
                    If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = False Then
                        MakeFolder(tmpLogFolder)
                        SaveStep = 1
                    Else
                        SaveStep = 1
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 1 Then
                    If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = True Then
                        SaveStep = 2
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 2 Then
                    If CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = False Then
                        MakeFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt")
                        SaveStep = 3
                    Else
                        SaveStep = 3
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 3 Then
                    If CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = True Then
                        SaveStep = 4
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 4 Then
                    WriteFile(tmpLogFolder, strType & ".txt", Tmpdtp & strMsg)
                    Exit Do
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                Exit Do
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Public Class HiResTimer

        Private isPerfCounterSupported As Boolean = False
        Private timerFrequency As Int64 = 0
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceCounter Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceFrequency Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short

        Public Sub New()
            Dim returnVal As Integer = QueryPerformanceFrequency(timerFrequency)
            If returnVal <> 0 AndAlso timerFrequency <> 1000 Then
                isPerfCounterSupported = True
            Else
                timerFrequency = 1000
            End If
        End Sub

        Public ReadOnly Property Frequency() As Int64
            Get
                Return timerFrequency
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property Value() As Int64
            Get
                Dim tickCount As Int64 = 0

                If isPerfCounterSupported Then
                    QueryPerformanceCounter(tickCount)
                    Return tickCount
                Else
                    Return CType(Environment.TickCount, Int64)
                End If
            End Get
        End Property

    End Class

    Public Function Hex2Bin(ByVal sHex As String) As String
        Dim sBin As String
        sBin = ""
        If Len(sHex) > 2 Then
            sHex = UCase(sHex)
            If Left(sHex, 2) = "&H" Then
                Dim iHex As Integer, jHex As Integer
                Dim cHex As String
                Dim HBi As Integer
                Dim HBin As String
                sHex = Mid(sHex, 3)
                For HBi = 1 To Len(sHex)
                    cHex = Mid(sHex, HBi, 1)
                    Select Case cHex
                        Case "A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"
                            iHex = Asc(cHex) - 55
                        Case Else
                            iHex = Val(cHex)
                    End Select
                    HBin = ""
                    jHex = 8
                    For HBj = 1 To 4
                        If iHex >= jHex Then
                            HBin = HBin & "1"
                            iHex = iHex - jHex
                        Else
                            HBin = HBin & "0"
                        End If
                        jHex = jHex / 2
                    Next
                    sBin = sBin & HBin
                Next
            End If
        End If
        Return sBin
    End Function

    Public Function Bin2Hex(ByVal sBin As String)
        Dim sHex As String
        Dim lenBin As Integer
        sHex = ""
        lenBin = Len(sBin)
        If lenBin > 0 Then
            Dim splitLen As Integer
            Dim splitBin As String
            Dim iBin As Integer
            Dim jBin As Integer
            If lenBin Mod 4 <> 0 Then
                For BHi = 1 To 4 - (lenBin Mod 4)
                    sBin = "0" & sBin
                Next
            End If
            lenBin = Len(sBin)
            splitLen = lenBin / 4
            For BHi = 1 To splitLen
                splitBin = Mid(sBin, ((BHi - 1) * 4) + 1, 4)
                jBin = 8
                iBin = 0
                For BHj = 1 To 4
                    If Mid(splitBin, BHj, 1) = "1" Then
                        iBin = iBin + jBin
                    End If
                    jBin = jBin / 2
                Next
                sHex = sHex & Hex(iBin)
            Next
        End If
        Return sHex

    End Function

End Module

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
        hexv = ""
        Do While DecNum > 0
            na = DecNum Mod 16
            Select Case na
                Case 10
                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 11
                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 12
                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 13
                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 14
                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 15
                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                Case Else
                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
            End Select
            If DecNum >= 16 Then
                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
            Else
                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop
        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
        Else
            Dec2Hex = hexv
        End If
        If DecNum = 0 Then
            Dec2Hex = "00"
        End If
    End Function

    Public Function NullCheck(ByVal strVal) As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Try
            tmp = strVal
        Catch ex As Exception
            tmp = ""
        End Try
        Return tmp
    End Function

    Public Function Asc2PrinterStr(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        If Len(str) > 2 Then
            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(str)
                If Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 4 Then 'EOT
                    tmp = tmp & EOT
                ElseIf Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 30 Then 'RS
                    tmp = tmp & RS
                ElseIf Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 29 Then 'GS
                    tmp = tmp & GS
                Else
                    tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
                End If
            Next
        Else
        End If
        If tmp = "" Then
        Else
            tmp = "#" & tmp
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Function CheckPing(ByVal strAddress As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Try
            tmp = My.Computer.Network.Ping(strAddress)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Function CheckFolder(ByVal folder As String) As Boolean

        Try
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        End Try

    End Function

    Function CheckFile(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String) As Boolean
        Return System.IO.File.Exists(folder & "\" & file)
    End Function

    Sub MakeFolder(ByVal folder As String)
        Try
            System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub WriteFile(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String, ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Using f As New StreamWriter(folder & "\" & file, True)
                f.WriteLine(str)
            End Using
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub MakeFile(ByVal folder As String, ByVal File As String)
        Try
            System.IO.File.Create(folder & "\" & File)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public tmpFileName As String

    Public Sub WriteLog(ByVal strMsg As String, ByVal strType As String)

        Dim flagSave = True
        Dim tmpLogFolder As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
        Dim Tmpdtp As String = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & vbTab
        Dim SaveStep As Integer = 0

        Do
            Try
                If SaveStep = 0 Then
                    If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = False Then
                        MakeFolder(tmpLogFolder)
                        SaveStep = 1
                    Else
                        SaveStep = 1
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 1 Then
                    If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = True Then
                        SaveStep = 2
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 2 Then
                    If CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = False Then
                        MakeFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt")
                        SaveStep = 3
                    Else
                        SaveStep = 3
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 3 Then
                    If CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = True Then
                        SaveStep = 4
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 4 Then
                    WriteFile(tmpLogFolder, strType & ".txt", Tmpdtp & strMsg)
                    Exit Do
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                Exit Do
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Public Function DeleteSpace(ByVal str As String) As String
        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            If Mid(str, i, 1) = " " Then
            Else
                tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
            End If
        Next
        tmp = tmp
        Return tmp
    End Function

    Public Class HiResTimer

        Private isPerfCounterSupported As Boolean = False
        Private timerFrequency As Int64 = 0
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceCounter Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceFrequency Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short

        Public Sub New()
            Dim returnVal As Integer = QueryPerformanceFrequency(timerFrequency)
            If returnVal <> 0 AndAlso timerFrequency <> 1000 Then
                isPerfCounterSupported = True
            Else
                timerFrequency = 1000
            End If
        End Sub

        Public ReadOnly Property Frequency() As Int64
            Get
                Return timerFrequency
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property Value() As Int64
            Get
                Dim tickCount As Int64 = 0

                If isPerfCounterSupported Then
                    QueryPerformanceCounter(tickCount)
                    Return tickCount
                Else
                    Return CType(Environment.TickCount, Int64)
                End If
            End Get
        End Property

    End Class

    Public Function Hex2Bin(ByVal sHex As String) As String
        Dim sBin As String
        sBin = ""
        If Len(sHex) > 2 Then
            sHex = UCase(sHex)
            If Left(sHex, 2) = "&H" Then
                Dim iHex As Integer, jHex As Integer
                Dim cHex As String
                Dim HBi As Integer
                Dim HBin As String
                sHex = Mid(sHex, 3)
                For HBi = 1 To Len(sHex)
                    cHex = Mid(sHex, HBi, 1)
                    Select Case cHex
                        Case "A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"
                            iHex = Asc(cHex) - 55
                        Case Else
                            iHex = Val(cHex)
                    End Select
                    HBin = ""
                    jHex = 8
                    For HBj = 1 To 4
                        If iHex >= jHex Then
                            HBin = HBin & "1"
                            iHex = iHex - jHex
                        Else
                            HBin = HBin & "0"
                        End If
                        jHex = jHex / 2
                    Next
                    sBin = sBin & HBin
                Next
            End If
        End If
        Return sBin
    End Function

    Public Function Bin2Hex(ByVal sBin As String)
        Dim sHex As String
        Dim lenBin As Integer
        sHex = ""
        lenBin = Len(sBin)
        If lenBin > 0 Then
            Dim splitLen As Integer
            Dim splitBin As String
            Dim iBin As Integer
            Dim jBin As Integer
            If lenBin Mod 4 <> 0 Then
                For BHi = 1 To 4 - (lenBin Mod 4)
                    sBin = "0" & sBin
                Next
            End If
            lenBin = Len(sBin)
            splitLen = lenBin / 4
            For BHi = 1 To splitLen
                splitBin = Mid(sBin, ((BHi - 1) * 4) + 1, 4)
                jBin = 8
                iBin = 0
                For BHj = 1 To 4
                    If Mid(splitBin, BHj, 1) = "1" Then
                        iBin = iBin + jBin
                    End If
                    jBin = jBin / 2
                Next
                sHex = sHex & Hex(iBin)
            Next
        End If
        Return sHex

    End Function

End Module

﻿Imports System.Net.Sockets
Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Net
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Media
Imports System
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms
Imports System.Drawing.Drawing2D
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO.Ports
Imports System.Reflection
Imports System.Management
Imports System.Security.Cryptography
Imports NationalInstruments
Imports NationalInstruments.DAQmx
Public Class FrmMain

    Private Player As New SoundPlayer
    Private Trd1 As Thread
    Private Trd2 As Thread
    Private Timer As New HiResTimer()

    Private Sub WriteText(ByVal TargetTextbox As TextBox, ByVal strMsg As String)

        If TargetTextbox.Lines.Length > 12 Then
            TargetTextbox.Text.Remove(0)
        End If
        TargetTextbox.AppendText(Format(Now, "yy-MM-dd") & " " & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "-" & strMsg & vbCrLf)

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        Control.CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        FlagTest = False

        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "Program Start")
        LoadSetData()
        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "Load Set Data OK")
        LoadBarcodeData()
        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "Load Barcode Data OK")
        SerialOpen()

        If CheckFolder(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log") = False Then MakeFolder(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log")
        WriteLog("Program Start", "LOG")

        LoadSetData()

        InitGraphs()
        InitControl()
        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()


        'S 00101 01010 11000 00000 00000 00000 00000 00000 00000 00000 01000 10001 0001 E

        DoutString = "S" & "00000000" & "00000000" & "E"
        DoutString2 = "S" & "00000000" & "00000000" & "E"
        If SerialIO.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskDio)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
            Call SerialIO.Write(DoutString)
        End If

        If SerialIO2.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskDio2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Call SerialIO2.Write(DoutString)
        End If

        Timer1.Interval = 100
        Timer1.Start()

        Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask)
        Trd1.IsBackground = True
        Trd1.Start()

        DaqStart()

        SetVoltage(0, 0)
        SetVoltage(1, 0)

    End Sub

    Private RecvString As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
    Private RecvString2 As New System.Text.StringBuilder()


    Public Sub DOON(ByVal num1 As Integer)

        If num1 < 16 Then
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "1"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Else
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString2, CInt(num1 - 14), 1) = "1"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Public Sub DOOFF(ByVal num1 As Integer)
        If num1 < 16 Then
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "0"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Else
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString2, CInt(num1 - 14), 1) = "0"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End If
    End Sub


    Public Sub DOWRITE()
        If SerialIO.IsOpen = True Then SerialIO.Write(DoutString)
        If SerialIO2.IsOpen = True Then SerialIO2.Write(DoutString2)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskDio()

        Dim i As Integer
        Do While SerialIO.IsOpen = True
            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = SerialIO.ReadLine()
                If Incoming Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else
                    RecvString.Append(Incoming)
                    If RecvString.Length = 66 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 66, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    SerialIO.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskDio2()

        Dim i As Integer
        Do While SerialIO2.IsOpen = True
            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = SerialIO2.ReadLine()
                If Incoming Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else
                    RecvString2.Append(Incoming)
                    If RecvString2.Length = 66 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString2.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString2.ToString, 66, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(i + 32) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString2.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString2.Clear()
                    SerialIO2.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

#Region "Function"

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(ByVal strData As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Dim i As Integer
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Dim tmpQurry As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main Where "
        'For i = 1 To SeqTotal
        '    If i = SeqTotal Then
        '        tmpQurry = tmpQurry & "Job" & CStr(i) & "Value = '" & strData & "'"
        '    Else
        '        tmpQurry = tmpQurry & "Job" & CStr(i) & "Value = '" & strData & "' OR "
        '    End If
        'Next
        Rs.Open(tmpQurry, MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then tmp = True
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub SerialOpen()

        PortOpen(SerialScanner, PortNumberScanner, LedScanner, 9600)
        PortOpen(Serialprinter, PortNumberPrinter, LedPrinter, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialIO, PortNumberIo, LedDIO, 115200)
        PortOpen(SerialIO2, PortNumberIo2, LedDIO2, 115200)
        PortOpen(SerialPowerSupply, PortNumberPowerSupply, LedSUpply, 9600)
        If SerialPowerSupply.IsOpen = True Then SerialPowerSupply.WriteLine("*ADR 1")

    End Sub

    Private Sub PortOpen(ByVal tControl As SerialPort, ByVal tPortNumber As String, ByVal Indicator As Panel, ByVal tbaudRate As Integer)

        If tPortNumber = "Disabled" Then
            Indicator.BackColor = Color.Gray
        Else
            Try
                If tControl.IsOpen() = True Then
                    tControl.Close()
                End If
                tControl.PortName = tPortNumber
                tControl.BaudRate = tbaudRate
                tControl.DataBits = 8
                tControl.Open()
                Indicator.BackColor = Color.Lime
                WriteText(TextboxSystem, tControl.PortName & " " & Replace(Indicator.Name, "Led", "") & " " & "Serial Port Open OK")
            Catch ex As Exception
                Indicator.BackColor = Color.Gray
                WriteText(TextboxSystem, tControl.PortName & " " & Replace(Indicator.Name, "Led", "") & " " & "Serial Port Open NG")
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    ' NI 컨트롤 제거 후 표준 컨트롤 초기화 (기존 InitControl 대체)

#Region "Count"

    Private Sub InitGrid()
        With GridCount
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()
            .Columns.Add("JobPartNo", "품번")
            .Columns.Add("JobCount", "생산수량")
        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadGrid()

        Dim TotalCOunt As Integer = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT JObPartNo,JobCount FROM Table_Count ORDER BY LEN(JobPartNo),JobPartNo", MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    GridCount.Rows.Add(Rs.Fields("JobPartNo").Value, Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
                    TotalCOunt = TotalCOunt + CInt(Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
        End If
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ResetGrid()

        Dim strSQL As String
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        strSQL = "DELETE * FROM TABLE_COUNT"
        MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub AddCount(ByVal strPart As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpInt As Integer
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Count WHERE JobPartNo = '" & strPart & "'", MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
            Rs.AddNew()
            Rs.Fields("JobPartno").Value = strPart
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = "1"
            Rs.Update()
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            TmpInt = CInt(Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
            TmpInt = TmpInt + 1
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = CStr(TmpInt)
            Rs.Update()
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub SerialScanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialScanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String

        Incoming = SerialScanner.ReadLine()
        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        SerialScanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        WriteLog("Scanner Input" & vbTab & ScanData, "LOG")

    Private Sub WriteLinHex2Asc(ByVal getStr As String, ByVal wPort As SerialPort)

        Dim str As String = Trim(getStr)
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim strTmp As String = "00"
        Dim Tmp2 As String
        Dim strBuffer(20) As Byte
        Dim j As Integer = 0

        For i = 1 To Len(str) Step 2
            strTmp = Mid(str, i, 2)
            strBuffer(j) = "&H" & strTmp
            j = j + 1
        Next i

        strBuffer(j) = "&H13"
        If wPort.IsOpen = True Then wPort.Write(strBuffer, 0, j + 1)

    End Sub

    Private Sub DecideControl(lValue As Label, lDecision As Label, sMin As Double, sMax As Double, mValue As Double)

        lValue.Text = CStr(mValue)
        If mValue >= sMin And mValue <= sMax Then
            lDecision.Text = "OK"
            lDecision.ForeColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            lDecision.Text = "NG"
            lDecision.ForeColor = Color.Red
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask()

        Dim i As Integer = 0

        Dim GetCount As Double = 0
        Dim TicStep As Integer = 0
        Dim pStart As Double = 0
        Dim pEnd As Double = 0
        Dim getStart As Boolean
        Dim getEnd As Boolean
        Do

            LbStep.Text = "Step : " & wStep & "/" & ResetSTep

            If IoInput(2) = 1 Then
                lbCellType.Text = "1CELL"
            Else
                lbCellType.Text = "7CELL"
            End If

            If lbCellType.Text = "1CELL" Then

                If IoInput(1) = 1 Then
                    ResetCount = ResetCount + 0.1
                Else
                    ResetCount = 0
                End If
                If ResetCount > 1 Then ResetSTep = 1

                If ResetSTep = 1 Then

                    For i = 0 To 31
                        DOOFF(i)
                    Next
                    DOON(23) ' 커넥터 후진
                    ResetSTep = 1.1

                ElseIf ResetSTep = 1.1 Then

                    If IoInput(42) = 1 Then
                        DOOFF(23)
                        DOON(19) '배관 후진
                        DOON(21)
                        ResetSTep = 2
                    End If

                ElseIf ResetSTep = 2 Then
                    If IoInput(38) = 1 And IoInput(40) = 1 Then
                        DOOFF(19)
                        DOOFF(21)
                        DOON(17) '언클램프
                        ResetSTep = 3
                    End If
                ElseIf ResetSTep = 3 Then

                    If IoInput(36) = 1 Then
                        DOOFF(17)
                        SetVoltage(0, 0)
                        SetVoltage(1, 0)
                        InitGraphs()
        InitControl()
                        ResetSTep = 0
                        wStep = 0
                    End If

                End If

                If ResetSTep = 0 Then

                    If wStep = 0 Then
                        wStep = 1
                    ElseIf wStep = 1 Then
                        If IoInput(0) = 1 Then '시작 버튼
                            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
                            InitGraphs()
        InitControl()
                            wStep = 2
                        End If
                    ElseIf wStep = 2 Then
                        DOON(16) '클램프
                        wStep = 3
                    ElseIf wStep = 3 Then
                        If IoInput(35) = 1 And IoInput(0) = 0 Then '클램프
                            DOOFF(16)
                            wStep = 4
                        End If
                    ElseIf wStep = 4 Then
                        DOON(22) '커넥터 전진
                        wStep = 5
                    ElseIf wStep = 5 Then
                        If IoInput(41) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(22)
                            DOON(3) '제품고정하강
                            wStep = 6
                        End If
                    ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

                        wStep = 10

                    ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

                        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "1차 검사 시작")
                        wStep = 20

                    ElseIf wStep = 20 Then '검사 1 프린지 검사 동작 A 1

                        _1Count = 0
                        TmpAmpMax = 0
                        TmpNoiseMax = 0
                        CounterAtStart = Timer.Value
                        TicStep = 0
                        wStep = 21

                    ElseIf wStep = 21 Then

                        CounterAtNow = Timer.Value

                            If srcGraph3Amp.IsHandleCreated = True Then ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraph3Amp, 0, ValueAmp, TotalTime)
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try
                        If ArryCount < ArryMaxSize Then
                            ArryAmp(ArryCount) = ValueAmp
                            ArryNoise(ArryCount) = ValueNoise
                            ArryFlow(ArryCount) = ValueFlow
                            ArryTime(ArryCount) = TotalTime
                            ArryCount = ArryCount + 1
                        End If
                        If TotalTime >= _3TestTime Then
                            CounterAtStart = Timer.Value
                            SetVoltage(0, 0)
                            wStep = 203
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 203 Then

                        For i = 0 To ArryCount - 1
                            If ArryTime(i) >= 0.5 And ArryTime(i) <= TotalTime - 0.5 Then
                                If TmpAmpMax < ArryAmp(i) Then TmpAmpMax = ArryAmp(i)
                                If TmpNoiseMax < ArryNoise(i) Then TmpNoiseMax = ArryNoise(i)
                                If TmpFlowMax < ArryFlow(i) Then TmpFlowMax = ArryFlow(i)
                            End If
                        Next

                        CounterAtNow = Timer.Value
                        TotalTime = CDbl(((CounterAtNow - CounterAtStart) * 10000 / Timer.Frequency) / 10000)
                        If TotalTime > 0.5 Then
                            DOOFF(10)
                            wStep = 204
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 204 Then

                        Try
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try
                        Try
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try
                        Try
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try

                        DecideControl(src3Flow, src3FlowDec, _3FlowMin, _3FlowMax, TmpFlowMax)
                        DecideControl(src3Noise, src3NoiseDec, _3NoiseMin, _3NoiseMax, TmpNoiseMax)
                        DecideControl(src3Amp, src3AmpDec, _3AmpMin, _3AmpMax, TmpAmpMax)
                        wStep = 300

                    ElseIf wStep = 300 Then

                        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "4차 이동 시작")
                        DOON(4) ' 우측삽입 후진
                        wStep = 301

                    ElseIf wStep = 301 Then

                        If IoInput(8) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(4)
                            DOON(8) '배관 A
                            wStep = 302
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 302 Then

                        If IoInput(11) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(8)
                            DOON(5)
                            wStep = 303
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 303 Then

                        If IoInput(7) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(5)
                            wStep = 400
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 400 Then

                        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "4차 검사 시작")
                        TmpAmpMax = 0
                        TmpFlowMax = 0
                        TmpNoiseMax = 0
                        ArryCount = 0
                        CounterAtStart = Timer.Value
                        SetVoltage(1, _4Air)
                        wStep = 401

                    ElseIf wStep = 401 Then

                        CounterAtNow = Timer.Value
                        TotalTime = CDbl(((CounterAtNow - CounterAtStart) * 10000 / Timer.Frequency) / 10000)
                        If TotalTime > 0.5 Then
                            DOON(11)
                            pStart = 0
                            pEnd = 0
                            wStep = 402
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 402 Then

                        CounterAtNow = Timer.Value
                        TotalTime = CDbl(((CounterAtNow - CounterAtStart) * 10000 / Timer.Frequency) / 10000)
                        Try
                            If srcGraph4Flow.IsHandleCreated = True Then ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraph4Flow, 0, ValueFlow, TotalTime)
                            If srcGraph4Noise.IsHandleCreated = True Then ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraph4Noise, 0, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                            If srcGraph4Amp.IsHandleCreated = True Then ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraph4Amp, 0, ValueAmp, TotalTime)
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try
                        If ArryCount < ArryMaxSize Then
                            ArryAmp(ArryCount) = ValueAmp
                            ArryNoise(ArryCount) = ValueNoise
                            ArryFlow(ArryCount) = ValueFlow
                            ArryTime(ArryCount) = TotalTime
                            ArryCount = ArryCount + 1
                        End If
                        If TotalTime >= _4TestTime Then
                            CounterAtStart = Timer.Value
                            SetVoltage(1, 0)
                            wStep = 403
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 403 Then

                        For i = 0 To ArryCount - 1
                            If ArryTime(i) >= 0.5 And ArryTime(i) <= TotalTime - 0.5 Then
                                If TmpAmpMax < ArryAmp(i) Then TmpAmpMax = ArryAmp(i)
                                If TmpNoiseMax < ArryNoise(i) Then TmpNoiseMax = ArryNoise(i)
                                If TmpFlowMax < ArryFlow(i) Then TmpFlowMax = ArryFlow(i)
                            End If
                        Next

                        CounterAtNow = Timer.Value
                        TotalTime = CDbl(((CounterAtNow - CounterAtStart) * 10000 / Timer.Frequency) / 10000)
                        If TotalTime > 0.5 Then
                            DOOFF(11)
                            wStep = 404
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 404 Then

                        Try
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try
                        Try
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try
                        Try
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try

                        DecideControl(src4Flow, src4FlowDec, _4FlowMin, _4FlowMax, TmpFlowMax)
                        DecideControl(src4Noise, src4NoiseDec, _4NoiseMin, _4NoiseMax, TmpNoiseMax)
                        DecideControl(src4Amp, src4AmpDec, _4AmpMin, _4AmpMax, TmpAmpMax)
                        wStep = 450

                    ElseIf wStep = 450 Then

                        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "5차 검사 시작")
                        TmpAmpMax = 0
                        TmpFlowMax = 0
                        TmpNoiseMax = 0
                        TmpFlowMin = 10000
                        ArryCount = 0
                        CounterAtStart = Timer.Value
                        SetVoltage(1, _5Air)
                        pStart = 0
                        pEnd = 0
                        getStart = False
                        getEnd = False
                        wStep = 451

                    ElseIf wStep = 451 Then

                        CounterAtNow = Timer.Value
                        TotalTime = CDbl(((CounterAtNow - CounterAtStart) * 10000 / Timer.Frequency) / 10000)
                        Try
                            If srcGraph5Flow.IsHandleCreated = True Then ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraph5Flow, 0, ValuePressure, TotalTime)
                            If srcGraph5Noise.IsHandleCreated = True Then ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(srcGraph5Noise, 0, ValueNoise, TotalTime)
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try
                        If ArryCount < ArryMaxSize Then
                            ArryAmp(ArryCount) = ValueAmp
                            ArryNoise(ArryCount) = ValueNoise
                            ArryFlow(ArryCount) = ValuePressure
                            ArryTime(ArryCount) = TotalTime
                            ArryCount = ArryCount + 1
                        End If
                        If TotalTime >= 2 And getStart = False Then
                            pStart = ValuePressure
                            getStart = True
                            SetVoltage(1, 0)
                        End If
                        If TotalTime >= _5TestTime Then
                            CounterAtStart = Timer.Value
                            pEnd = ValuePressure
                            wStep = 452
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 452 Then

                        For i = 0 To ArryCount - 1
                            If ArryTime(i) >= 0.5 And ArryTime(i) <= TotalTime - 0.5 Then
                                If TmpAmpMax < ArryAmp(i) Then TmpAmpMax = ArryAmp(i)
                                If TmpNoiseMax < ArryNoise(i) Then TmpNoiseMax = ArryNoise(i)
                                If TmpFlowMax < ArryFlow(i) Then TmpFlowMax = ArryFlow(i)
                                If TmpFlowMin > ArryFlow(i) Then TmpFlowMin = ArryFlow(i)
                            End If
                        Next
                        wStep = 453

                    ElseIf wStep = 453 Then

                        Try
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try
                        Try
                        Catch ex As Exception
                        End Try

                        DecideControl(src5Flow, src5FlowDec, _5FlowMin, _5FlowMax, Math.Abs(pStart - pEnd))
                        DecideControl(src5Noise, src5NoiseDec, _5NoiseMin, _5NoiseMax, TmpNoiseMax)
                        wStep = 499

                    ElseIf wStep = 499 Then 'SAVE

                        SaveDB()

                    ElseIf wStep = 500 Then

                        DOON(6)
                        DOON(4)
                        wStep = 501

                    ElseIf wStep = 501 Then

                        If IoInput(10) = 1 And IoInput(8) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(6)
                            DOOFF(4)
                            DOON(2)
                            wStep = 502
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 502 Then

                        If IoInput(6) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(2)
                            DOON(0)
                            wStep = 503
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 503 Then

                        If IoInput(4) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(0)
                            SetVoltage(0, 0)
                            SetVoltage(1, 0)
                            If src1NoiseDec.Text = "OK" And src1AmpDec.Text = "OK" And
                                   src2FlowDec.Text = "OK" And src2NoiseDec.Text = "OK" And
                                   src3FlowDec.Text = "OK" And src3NoiseDec.Text = "OK" And src3AmpDec.Text = "OK" And
                                   src4FlowDec.Text = "OK" And src4NoiseDec.Text = "OK" And src4AmpDec.Text = "OK" Then
                                AddCount("OK")
                            Else
                                AddCount("NG")
                            End If
                            InitGrid()
                            LoadGrid()
                            wStep = 0
                        End If

                    End If

                End If

            End If


            Thread.Sleep(100)
            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private RequestSTep As Integer

    Private Sub RequestSupply(ByVal SupplyPort As System.IO.Ports.SerialPort, ByVal strMsg As String)
        Try
            If SupplyPort.IsOpen = True Then
                SupplyPort.WriteLine(strMsg)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private reqcount As Double

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        DOWRITE()
        If RequestSTep = 0 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialPowerSupply, "MEAS:VOLT?")
            reqcount = 0
            RequestSTep = 1
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 1 Then
            reqcount = reqcount + 0.1
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 2 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialPowerSupply, "MEAS:CURR?")
            reqcount = 0
            RequestSTep = 3
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 3 Then
            reqcount = reqcount + 0.1
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 4 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialPowerSupply, "SOURS:VOLT " & CStr(TargetVolt))
            reqcount = 0
            RequestSTep = 0
        End If

        If reqcount > 1 Then RequestSTep = 0

        lbVOlt.Text = ValueVolt & " " & "V"
        lbAMP.Text = ValueAmp & " " & "A"

    End Sub

    Private Buffer As String
    Public ValueVolt As Double
    Public ValueAmp As Double
    Private Sub SerialPowerSupply_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialPowerSupply.DataReceived
        Try
            Dim RecvData As String = SerialPowerSupply.ReadExisting()
            Buffer = Buffer & RecvData
            If Buffer.Contains(Chr(13)) = True Then 'ETX
                If RequestSTep = 1 Then
                    ValueVolt = CDbl(Format(CDbl(Mid(Buffer, 1, Len(Buffer) - 1)), "#0.0#"))
                    RequestSTep = 2
                ElseIf RequestStep = 3 Then
                    ValueAmp = CDbl(Format(CDbl(Mid(Buffer, 1, Len(Buffer) - 1)), "#0.0#"))
                    RequestSTep = 4
                End If
                Buffer = ""
                SerialPowerSupply.DiscardInBuffer()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

#Region "NI DAQMX"

    Private myTask As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private myTask2 As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private runningTask As Task
    Private data As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)()
    Private analogInReader As AnalogMultiChannelReader
    Private analogCallback As AsyncCallback
    Private dataColumn As DataColumn()
    Private dataTable As DataTable = New DataTable

    Public Sub SetVoltage(Channel As Integer, Val As Double)

        Try
            myTask2 = New Task()
            If Channel = 0 Then
                myTask2.AOChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ao0", "aoChannel", Convert.ToDouble("-10"), Convert.ToDouble("10"), AOVoltageUnits.Volts)
                lbDo1.Text = CStr(Val) & " Bar"
            ElseIf Channel = 1 Then
                myTask2.AOChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ao1", "aoChannel", Convert.ToDouble("-10"), Convert.ToDouble("10"), AOVoltageUnits.Volts)
                lbDo2.Text = CStr(Val) & " Bar"
            End If
            Dim writer As AnalogSingleChannelWriter = New AnalogSingleChannelWriter(myTask2.Stream)
            writer.WriteSingleSample(True, Convert.ToDouble(CStr(Val) * 10))
        Catch ex As DaqException
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message)
        Finally
            myTask2.Dispose()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub AnalogInCallback(ByVal ar As IAsyncResult)
        Try
            If (Not (runningTask Is Nothing)) AndAlso runningTask Is ar.AsyncState Then
                data = analogInReader.EndReadWaveform(ar)
                dataToDataTable(data, dataTable)
                analogInReader.BeginMemoryOptimizedReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask, data)
            End If
        Catch ex As DaqException
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message)
            runningTask = Nothing
            myTask.Dispose()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private ValueNoise As Double
    Private ValueFlow As Double
    Private ValuePressure As Double
    Private Sub dataToDataTable(ByVal sourceArray As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)(), ByRef dataTable As DataTable)

        Dim currentLineIndex As Integer = 0
        Dim Ch1AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch1AvrSUm As Double = 0
        Dim Ch2AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch2AvrSUm As Double = 0
        Dim Ch3AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch3AvrSUm As Double = 0

        For Each waveform As AnalogWaveform(Of Double) In sourceArray
            Dim dataCount As Integer = 0
            If waveform.Samples.Count < 10 Then
                dataCount = waveform.Samples.Count
            Else
                dataCount = 10
            End If

            For sample As Integer = 0 To (dataCount - 1)
                dataTable.Rows(sample)(currentLineIndex) = waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                If currentLineIndex = 0 Then
                    Ch1AvrSUm = Ch1AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch1AvrCOunt = Ch1AvrCOunt + 1
                ElseIf currentLineIndex = 1 Then
                    Ch2AvrSUm = Ch2AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch2AvrCOunt = Ch2AvrCOunt + 1
                ElseIf currentLineIndex = 2 Then
                    Ch3AvrSUm = Ch3AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch3AvrCOunt = Ch3AvrCOunt + 1
                End If
            Next
            currentLineIndex += 1
        Next

        '1 bar <-> 1.02 kgf.cm^2
        '1 kf.cm^2 <-> 1/ 1.02 kgf.cm^2
        '1 bar <-> 100 Kpa

        ValueNoise = CDbl(Format((Ch1AvrSUm / Ch1AvrCOunt * 100), "#0.0#"))
        If CDbl(Format(((Ch3AvrSUm / Ch3AvrCOunt) + 0.61) * 100, "#0.0#")) > 1 Then
            ValuePressure = CDbl(Format(((Ch3AvrSUm / Ch3AvrCOunt) + 0.61) * 100, "#0.0#"))
        Else
            ValuePressure = 0
        End If

        ValueFlow = (CDbl(Format((Ch2AvrSUm / Ch2AvrCOunt), "#0.0#")) * 20)

        'flow
        '0V 
        '5V - 100 L/min
        'y = 20x
        'Pressure
        '0V
        '5V - 200 Kpa
        'y = 0.04x
        lbNoise.text = CStr(ValueNoise) & " " & "dB"
        lbPressure.Text = CStr(ValuePressure) & " " & "KPa"
        lbFlow.Text = CStr(ValueFlow) & " " & "l/min"

    End Sub

    Public Sub InitializeDataTable(ByVal channelCollection As AIChannelCollection, ByRef data As DataTable)
        Dim numOfChannels As Int16 = channelCollection.Count
        data.Rows.Clear()
        data.Columns.Clear()
        dataColumn = New DataColumn(numOfChannels) {}
        Dim numOfRows As Int16 = 10
        Dim currentChannelIndex As Int16 = 0
        Dim currentDataIndex As Int16 = 0
        For currentChannelIndex = 0 To (numOfChannels - 1)
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex) = New DataColumn
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).DataType = System.Type.GetType("System.Double")
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).ColumnName = channelCollection(currentChannelIndex).PhysicalName
        Next
        data.Columns.AddRange(dataColumn)
        For currentDataIndex = 0 To (numOfRows - 1)
            Dim rowArr As Object() = New Object(numOfChannels - 1) {}
            data.Rows.Add(rowArr)
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqStart()

        If runningTask Is Nothing Then
            Try
                myTask = New Task()
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai0", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai1", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai2", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Control(TaskAction.Verify)
                runningTask = myTask
                analogInReader = New AnalogMultiChannelReader(myTask.Stream)
                analogCallback = New AsyncCallback(AddressOf AnalogInCallback)
                InitializeDataTable(myTask.AIChannels, dataTable)
                acquisitionDataGrid.DataSource = dataTable
                analogInReader.SynchronizeCallbacks = True
                analogInReader.BeginReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask)
                LedDAQ.BackColor = Color.Lime
            Catch exception As DaqException
                MessageBox.Show(exception.Message)
                runningTask = Nothing
                myTask.Dispose()
            End Try
        End If

        myTask2 = New Task()

    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqEnd()
        runningTask = Nothing
        myTask.Dispose()
    End Sub

    Private Sub ascButtonTest_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles ascButtonTest.Click
        FrmTest.Show()
    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles ascButtonTest.Click
        'FrmTest.Show()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        wStep = 10000
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        Try
            wStep = CDbl(TextBox1.Text)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub


#End Region

End Class

﻿Imports System.Net.Sockets
Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Net
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Media
Imports System
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms
Imports System.Drawing.Drawing2D
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO.Ports
Imports System.Reflection
Imports System.Management
Imports System.Security.Cryptography
Imports NationalInstruments
Imports NationalInstruments.DAQmx
Public Class FrmMain

    Private Player As New SoundPlayer
    Private Trd1 As Thread
    Private Trd2 As Thread
    Private Timer As New HiResTimer()

    Private Sub WriteText(ByVal TargetTextbox As TextBox, ByVal strMsg As String)

        If TargetTextbox.Lines.Length > 12 Then
            TargetTextbox.Text.Remove(0)
        End If
        TargetTextbox.AppendText(Format(Now, "yy-MM-dd") & " " & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "-" & strMsg & vbCrLf)

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        Control.CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        FlagTest = False

        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "Program Start")
        LoadSetData()
        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "Load Set Data OK")
        LoadBarcodeData()
        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "Load Barcode Data OK")
        SerialOpen()

        If CheckFolder(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log") = False Then MakeFolder(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log")
        WriteLog("Program Start", "LOG")

        LoadSetData()

        InitGraphs()
        InitControl()
        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()


        'S 00101 01010 11000 00000 00000 00000 00000 00000 00000 00000 01000 10001 0001 E

        DoutString = "S" & "00000000" & "00000000" & "E"
        DoutString2 = "S" & "00000000" & "00000000" & "E"
        If SerialIO.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskDio)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
            Call SerialIO.Write(DoutString)
        End If

        If SerialIO2.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskDio2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Call SerialIO2.Write(DoutString)
        End If

        Timer1.Interval = 100
        Timer1.Start()

        Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask)
        Trd1.IsBackground = True
        Trd1.Start()

        DaqStart()

        SetVoltage(0, 0)
        SetVoltage(1, 0)

    End Sub

    Private RecvString As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
    Private RecvString2 As New System.Text.StringBuilder()


    Public Sub DOON(ByVal num1 As Integer)

        If num1 < 16 Then
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "1"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Else
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString2, CInt(num1 - 14), 1) = "1"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Public Sub DOOFF(ByVal num1 As Integer)
        If num1 < 16 Then
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "0"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Else
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString2, CInt(num1 - 14), 1) = "0"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End If
    End Sub


    Public Sub DOWRITE()
        If SerialIO.IsOpen = True Then SerialIO.Write(DoutString)
        If SerialIO2.IsOpen = True Then SerialIO2.Write(DoutString2)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskDio()

        Dim i As Integer
        Do While SerialIO.IsOpen = True
            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = SerialIO.ReadLine()
                If Incoming Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else
                    RecvString.Append(Incoming)
                    If RecvString.Length = 66 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 66, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    SerialIO.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskDio2()

        Dim i As Integer
        Do While SerialIO2.IsOpen = True
            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = SerialIO2.ReadLine()
                If Incoming Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else
                    RecvString2.Append(Incoming)
                    If RecvString2.Length = 66 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString2.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString2.ToString, 66, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(i + 32) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString2.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString2.Clear()
                    SerialIO2.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub SerialOpen()

        PortOpen(SerialScanner, PortNumberScanner, LedScanner, 9600)
        PortOpen(Serialprinter, PortNumberPrinter, LedPrinter, 9600)
        PortOpen(SerialIO, PortNumberIo, LedDIO, 115200)
        PortOpen(SerialIO2, PortNumberIo2, LedDIO2, 115200)
        PortOpen(SerialPowerSupply, PortNumberPowerSupply, LedSUpply, 9600)
        If SerialPowerSupply.IsOpen = True Then SerialPowerSupply.WriteLine("*ADR 1")

    End Sub

    Private Sub PortOpen(ByVal tControl As SerialPort, ByVal tPortNumber As String, ByVal Indicator As Panel, ByVal tbaudRate As Integer)

        If tPortNumber = "Disabled" Then
            Indicator.BackColor = Color.Gray
        Else
            Try
                If tControl.IsOpen() = True Then
                    tControl.Close()
                End If
                tControl.PortName = tPortNumber
                tControl.BaudRate = tbaudRate
                tControl.DataBits = 8
                tControl.Open()
                Indicator.BackColor = Color.Lime
                WriteText(TextboxSystem, tControl.PortName & " " & Replace(Indicator.Name, "Led", "") & " " & "Serial Port Open OK")
            Catch ex As Exception
                Indicator.BackColor = Color.Gray
                WriteText(TextboxSystem, tControl.PortName & " " & Replace(Indicator.Name, "Led", "") & " " & "Serial Port Open NG")
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub InitGrid()
        With GridCount
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()
            .Columns.Add("JobPartNo", "품번")
            .Columns.Add("JobCount", "생산수량")
        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadGrid()

        Dim TotalCOunt As Integer = 0
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT JObPartNo,JobCount FROM Table_Count ORDER BY LEN(JobPartNo),JobPartNo", MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            Rs.MoveFirst()
            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    GridCount.Rows.Add(Rs.Fields("JobPartNo").Value, Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
                    TotalCOunt = TotalCOunt + CInt(Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
        End If
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ResetGrid()

        Dim strSQL As String
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        strSQL = "DELETE * FROM TABLE_COUNT"
        MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub AddCount(ByVal strPart As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpInt As Integer
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Count WHERE JobPartNo = '" & strPart & "'", MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
            Rs.AddNew()
            Rs.Fields("JobPartno").Value = strPart
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = "1"
            Rs.Update()
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            TmpInt = CInt(Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
            TmpInt = TmpInt + 1
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = CStr(TmpInt)
            Rs.Update()
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub WriteLinHex2Asc(ByVal getStr As String, ByVal wPort As SerialPort)

        Dim str As String = Trim(getStr)
        Dim i As Integer
        Dim tmp As String
        Dim strTmp As String = "00"
        Dim Tmp2 As String
        Dim strBuffer(20) As Byte
        Dim j As Integer = 0

        For i = 1 To Len(str) Step 2
            strTmp = Mid(str, i, 2)
            strBuffer(j) = "&H" & strTmp
            j = j + 1
        Next i

        strBuffer(j) = "&H13"
        If wPort.IsOpen = True Then wPort.Write(strBuffer, 0, j + 1)

    End Sub

    Private TmrCount As Double
    Private wStep As Double
    Private PcAliveCount As Double
    Private ResetCount As Double
    Private ResetSTep As Double

    Private Sub DecideControl(lValue As Label, lDecision As Label, sMin As Double, sMax As Double, mValue As Double)

        lValue.Text = CStr(mValue)
        If mValue >= sMin And mValue <= sMax Then
            lDecision.Text = "OK"
            lDecision.ForeColor = Color.Blue
        Else
            lDecision.Text = "NG"
            lDecision.ForeColor = Color.Red
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask()

        Dim i As Integer = 0
        Dim _1Count As Integer = 0
        Dim ArryCount As Int64 = 0
        Dim CounterAtStart As Int64 = 0
        Dim CounterAtNow As Int64 = 0
        Dim TotalTime As Double
        Dim CounterAtStart2 As Int64 = 0
        Dim CounterAtNow2 As Int64 = 0
        Dim TotalTime2 As Double
        Dim ArryMaxSize As Integer = 1000000
        Dim ArryTime(ArryMaxSize) As Double
        Dim ArryNoise(ArryMaxSize) As Double
        Dim ArryFlow(ArryMaxSize) As Double
        Dim ArryAmp(ArryMaxSize) As Double
        Dim TmpTicTime As Double = 0
        Dim TmpNoiseMax As Double = 0
        Dim TmpAmpMax As Double = 0
        Dim TmpFlowMax As Double = 0
        Dim TmpFlowMin As Double = 1000
        Dim GetCount As Double = 0
        Dim TicStep As Integer = 0
        Dim pStart As Double = 0
        Dim pEnd As Double = 0
        Dim getStart As Boolean
        Dim getEnd As Boolean
        Do

            LbStep.Text = "Step : " & wStep & "/" & ResetSTep

            If IoInput(2) = 1 Then
                lbCellType.Text = "1CELL"
            Else
                lbCellType.Text = "7CELL"
            End If

            If lbCellType.Text = "1CELL" Then

                If IoInput(1) = 1 Then
                    ResetCount = ResetCount + 0.1
                Else
                    ResetCount = 0
                End If
                If ResetCount > 1 Then ResetSTep = 1

                If ResetSTep = 1 Then

                    For i = 0 To 31
                        DOOFF(i)
                    Next
                    DOON(23) ' 커넥터 후진
                    ResetSTep = 1.1

                ElseIf ResetSTep = 1.1 Then

                    If IoInput(42) = 1 Then
                        DOOFF(23)
                        DOON(19) '배관 후진
                        DOON(21)
                        ResetSTep = 2
                    End If

                ElseIf ResetSTep = 2 Then
                    If IoInput(38) = 1 And IoInput(40) = 1 Then
                        DOOFF(19)
                        DOOFF(21)
                        DOON(17) '언클램프
                        ResetSTep = 3
                    End If
                ElseIf ResetSTep = 3 Then

                    If IoInput(36) = 1 Then
                        DOOFF(17)
                        SetVoltage(0, 0)
                        SetVoltage(1, 0)
                        InitGraphs()
        InitControl()
                        ResetSTep = 0
                        wStep = 0
                    End If

                End If

                If ResetSTep = 0 Then

                    If wStep = 0 Then
                        wStep = 1
                    ElseIf wStep = 1 Then
                        If IoInput(0) = 1 Then '시작 버튼
                            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")
                            InitGraphs()
        InitControl()
                            wStep = 2
                        End If
                    ElseIf wStep = 2 Then
                        DOON(16) '클램프
                        wStep = 3
                    ElseIf wStep = 3 Then
                        If IoInput(35) = 1 And IoInput(0) = 0 Then '클램프
                            DOOFF(16)
                            wStep = 4
                        End If
                    ElseIf wStep = 4 Then
                        DOON(22) '커넥터 전진
                        wStep = 5
                    ElseIf wStep = 5 Then
                        If IoInput(41) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(22)
                            DOON(3) '제품고정하강
                            wStep = 6
                        End If
                    ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

                        wStep = 10

                    ElseIf wStep = 10 Then

                        If _FirstPassEnabled Then
                            WriteText(TextboxSystem, "1차 검사 패스")
                            src1AmpDec.Text = "PASS"
                            src1AmpDec.ForeColor = Color.Blue
                            src1NoiseDec.Text = "PASS"
                            src1NoiseDec.ForeColor = Color.Blue
                            WriteText(TextboxSystem, "2차 검사 시작")
                            wStep = 75
                        Else
                            WriteText(TextboxSystem, "1차 검사 시작")
                            wStep = 20
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 20 Then '검사 1 프린지 검사 동작 A 1

                        _1Count = 0
                        TmpAmpMax = 0
                        TmpNoiseMax = 0
                        CounterAtStart = Timer.Value
                        TicStep = 0
                        wStep = 21

                    ElseIf wStep = 21 Then

                        CounterAtNow = Timer.Value
