                        End Try

                        DecideControl(src5Flow, src5FlowDec, _5FlowMin, _5FlowMax, Math.Abs(pStart - pEnd))
                        DecideControl(src5Noise, src5NoiseDec, _5NoiseMin, _5NoiseMax, TmpNoiseMax)
                        wStep = 499

                    ElseIf wStep = 499 Then 'SAVE

                        SaveDB()

                    ElseIf wStep = 500 Then

                        DOON(6)
                        DOON(4)
                        wStep = 501

                    ElseIf wStep = 501 Then

                        If IoInput(10) = 1 And IoInput(8) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(6)
                            DOOFF(4)
                            DOON(2)
                            wStep = 502
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 502 Then

                        If IoInput(6) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(2)
                            DOON(0)
                            wStep = 503
                        End If

                    ElseIf wStep = 503 Then

                        If IoInput(4) = 1 Then
                            DOOFF(0)
                            SetVoltage(0, 0)
                            SetVoltage(1, 0)
                            If src1NoiseDec.Text = "OK" And src1AmpDec.Text = "OK" And
                                   src2FlowDec.Text = "OK" And src2NoiseDec.Text = "OK" And
                                   src3FlowDec.Text = "OK" And src3NoiseDec.Text = "OK" And src3AmpDec.Text = "OK" And
                                   src4FlowDec.Text = "OK" And src4NoiseDec.Text = "OK" And src4AmpDec.Text = "OK" Then
                                AddCount("OK")
                            Else
                                AddCount("NG")
                            End If
                            InitGrid()
                            LoadGrid()
                            wStep = 0
                        End If

                    End If

                End If

            End If


            Thread.Sleep(100)
            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private RequestSTep As Integer

    Private Sub RequestSupply(ByVal SupplyPort As System.IO.Ports.SerialPort, ByVal strMsg As String)
        Try
            If SupplyPort.IsOpen = True Then
                SupplyPort.WriteLine(strMsg)
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private reqcount As Double

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        DOWRITE()
        If RequestSTep = 0 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialPowerSupply, "MEAS:VOLT?")
            reqcount = 0
            RequestSTep = 1
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 1 Then
            reqcount = reqcount + 0.1
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 2 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialPowerSupply, "MEAS:CURR?")
            reqcount = 0
            RequestSTep = 3
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 3 Then
            reqcount = reqcount + 0.1
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 4 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialPowerSupply, "SOURS:VOLT " & CStr(TargetVolt))
            reqcount = 0
            RequestSTep = 0
        End If

        If reqcount > 1 Then RequestSTep = 0

        lbVOlt.Text = ValueVolt & " " & "V"
        lbAMP.Text = ValueAmp & " " & "A"

    End Sub

    Private Buffer As String
    Public ValueVolt As Double
    Public ValueAmp As Double
    Private Sub SerialPowerSupply_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialPowerSupply.DataReceived
        Try
            Dim RecvData As String = SerialPowerSupply.ReadExisting()
            Buffer = Buffer & RecvData
            If Buffer.Contains(Chr(13)) = True Then 'ETX
                If RequestSTep = 1 Then
                    ValueVolt = CDbl(Format(CDbl(Mid(Buffer, 1, Len(Buffer) - 1)), "#0.0#"))
                    RequestSTep = 2
                ElseIf RequestStep = 3 Then
                    ValueAmp = CDbl(Format(CDbl(Mid(Buffer, 1, Len(Buffer) - 1)), "#0.0#"))
                    RequestSTep = 4
                End If
                Buffer = ""
                SerialPowerSupply.DiscardInBuffer()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

#Region "NI DAQMX"

    Private myTask As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private myTask2 As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private runningTask As Task
    Private data As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)()
    Private analogInReader As AnalogMultiChannelReader
    Private analogCallback As AsyncCallback
    Private dataColumn As DataColumn()
    Private dataTable As DataTable = New DataTable

    Public Sub SetVoltage(Channel As Integer, Val As Double)

        Try
            myTask2 = New Task()
            If Channel = 0 Then
                myTask2.AOChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ao0", "aoChannel", Convert.ToDouble("-10"), Convert.ToDouble("10"), AOVoltageUnits.Volts)
                lbDo1.Text = CStr(Val) & " Bar"
            ElseIf Channel = 1 Then
                myTask2.AOChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ao1", "aoChannel", Convert.ToDouble("-10"), Convert.ToDouble("10"), AOVoltageUnits.Volts)
                lbDo2.Text = CStr(Val) & " Bar"
            End If
            Dim writer As AnalogSingleChannelWriter = New AnalogSingleChannelWriter(myTask2.Stream)
            writer.WriteSingleSample(True, Convert.ToDouble(CStr(Val) * 10))
        Catch ex As DaqException
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message)
        Finally
            myTask2.Dispose()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub AnalogInCallback(ByVal ar As IAsyncResult)
        Try
            If (Not (runningTask Is Nothing)) AndAlso runningTask Is ar.AsyncState Then
                data = analogInReader.EndReadWaveform(ar)
                dataToDataTable(data, dataTable)
                analogInReader.BeginMemoryOptimizedReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask, data)
            End If
        Catch ex As DaqException
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message)
            runningTask = Nothing
            myTask.Dispose()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private ValueNoise As Double
    Private ValueFlow As Double
    Private ValuePressure As Double
    Private Sub dataToDataTable(ByVal sourceArray As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)(), ByRef dataTable As DataTable)

        Dim currentLineIndex As Integer = 0
        Dim Ch1AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch1AvrSUm As Double = 0
        Dim Ch2AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch2AvrSUm As Double = 0
        Dim Ch3AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch3AvrSUm As Double = 0

        For Each waveform As AnalogWaveform(Of Double) In sourceArray
            Dim dataCount As Integer = 0
            If waveform.Samples.Count < 10 Then
                dataCount = waveform.Samples.Count
            Else
                dataCount = 10
            End If

            For sample As Integer = 0 To (dataCount - 1)
                dataTable.Rows(sample)(currentLineIndex) = waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                If currentLineIndex = 0 Then
                    Ch1AvrSUm = Ch1AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch1AvrCOunt = Ch1AvrCOunt + 1
                ElseIf currentLineIndex = 1 Then
                    Ch2AvrSUm = Ch2AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch2AvrCOunt = Ch2AvrCOunt + 1
                ElseIf currentLineIndex = 2 Then
                    Ch3AvrSUm = Ch3AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch3AvrCOunt = Ch3AvrCOunt + 1
                End If
            Next
            currentLineIndex += 1
        Next

        '1 bar <-> 1.02 kgf.cm^2
        '1 kf.cm^2 <-> 1/ 1.02 kgf.cm^2
        '1 bar <-> 100 Kpa

        ValueNoise = CDbl(Format((Ch1AvrSUm / Ch1AvrCOunt * 100), "#0.0#"))
        If CDbl(Format(((Ch3AvrSUm / Ch3AvrCOunt) + 0.61) * 100, "#0.0#")) > 1 Then
            ValuePressure = CDbl(Format(((Ch3AvrSUm / Ch3AvrCOunt) + 0.61) * 100, "#0.0#"))
        Else
            ValuePressure = 0
        End If

        ValueFlow = (CDbl(Format((Ch2AvrSUm / Ch2AvrCOunt), "#0.0#")) * 20)

        'flow
        '0V 
        '5V - 100 L/min
        'y = 20x
        'Pressure
        '0V
        '5V - 200 Kpa
        'y = 0.04x
        lbNoise.text = CStr(ValueNoise) & " " & "dB"
        lbPressure.Text = CStr(ValuePressure) & " " & "KPa"
        lbFlow.Text = CStr(ValueFlow) & " " & "l/min"

    End Sub

    Public Sub InitializeDataTable(ByVal channelCollection As AIChannelCollection, ByRef data As DataTable)
        Dim numOfChannels As Int16 = channelCollection.Count
        data.Rows.Clear()
        data.Columns.Clear()
        dataColumn = New DataColumn(numOfChannels) {}
        Dim numOfRows As Int16 = 10
        Dim currentChannelIndex As Int16 = 0
        Dim currentDataIndex As Int16 = 0
        For currentChannelIndex = 0 To (numOfChannels - 1)
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex) = New DataColumn
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).DataType = System.Type.GetType("System.Double")
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).ColumnName = channelCollection(currentChannelIndex).PhysicalName
        Next
        data.Columns.AddRange(dataColumn)
        For currentDataIndex = 0 To (numOfRows - 1)
            Dim rowArr As Object() = New Object(numOfChannels - 1) {}
            data.Rows.Add(rowArr)
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqStart()

        If runningTask Is Nothing Then
            Try
                myTask = New Task()
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai0", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai1", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai2", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Control(TaskAction.Verify)
                runningTask = myTask
                analogInReader = New AnalogMultiChannelReader(myTask.Stream)
                analogCallback = New AsyncCallback(AddressOf AnalogInCallback)
                InitializeDataTable(myTask.AIChannels, dataTable)
                acquisitionDataGrid.DataSource = dataTable
                analogInReader.SynchronizeCallbacks = True
                analogInReader.BeginReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask)
                LedDAQ.BackColor = Color.Lime
            Catch exception As DaqException
                MessageBox.Show(exception.Message)
                runningTask = Nothing
                myTask.Dispose()
            End Try
        End If

        myTask2 = New Task()

    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqEnd()
        runningTask = Nothing
        myTask.Dispose()
    End Sub

    Private Sub ascButtonTest_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles ascButtonTest.Click
        FrmTest.Show()
    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles ascButtonTest.Click
        'FrmTest.Show()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        wStep = 10000
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        Try
            wStep = CDbl(TextBox1.Text)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub


#End Region

End Class

content.text: DB.mdb가 아직 배포 경로에 없습니다. 원본 위치를 찾습니다.

DB.mdb가 아직 없는 상태입니다. 배포 시 생성되는 것으로 보입니다. 코드에서 Try-Catch로 감싸뒀으므로 DB 컬럼이 없어도 에러는 안 납니다. DB.mdb 파일이 있으면 PowerShell로 컬럼 추가하면 됩니다.

이제 사용자 요청 반영 — OK/NG 판정 라벨: 글자색 흰색 통일, OK→BackColor Blue, NG→BackColor Red. DecideControl과 판정 관련 코드를 수정합니다.

Your task is to create a detailed summary of the conversation so far, paying close attention to the user's explicit requests and your previous actions.
This summary should be thorough in capturing technical details, code patterns, and architectural decisions that would be essential for continuing development work without losing context.

Before providing your final summary, wrap your analysis in <analysis> tags to organize your thoughts and ensure you've covered all necessary points. In your analysis process:

1. Chronologically analyze each message and section of the conversation. For each section thoroughly identify:
   - The user's explicit requests and intents
   - Your approach to addressing the user's requests
   - Key decisions, technical concepts and code patterns
   - Specific details like:
     - file names
     - full code snippets
     - function signatures
     - file edits
   - Errors that you ran into and how you fixed them
   - Pay special attention to specific user feedback that you received, especially if the user told you to do something differently.
2. Double-check for technical accuracy and completeness, addressing each required element thoroughly.

Your summary should include the following sections:

1. Primary Request and Intent: Capture all of the user's explicit requests and intents in detail
2. Key Technical Concepts: List all important technical concepts, technologies, and frameworks discussed.
3. Files and Code Sections: Enumerate specific files and code sections examined, modified, or created. Pay special attention to the most recent messages and include full code snippets where applicable and include a summary of why this file read or edit is important.
4. Errors and fixes: List all errors that you ran into, and how you fixed them. Pay special attention to specific user feedback that you received, especially if the user told you to do something differently.
5. Problem Solving: Document problems solved and any ongoing troubleshooting efforts.
6. All user messages: List ALL user messages that are not tool results. These are critical for understanding the users' feedback and changing intent.
7. Pending Tasks: Outline any pending tasks that you have explicitly been asked to work on.
8. Current Work: Describe in detail precisely what was being worked on immediately before this summary request, paying special attention to the most recent messages from both user and assistant. Include file names and code snippets where applicable.
9. Optional Next Step: List the next step that you will take that is related to the most recent work you were doing. IMPORTANT: ensure that this step is DIRECTLY in line with the user's most recent explicit requests, and the task you were working on immediately before this summary request. If your last task was concluded, then only list next steps if they are explicitly in line with the users request. Do not start on tangential requests or really old requests that were already completed without confirming with the user first.
                       If there is a next step, include direct quotes from the most recent conversation showing exactly what task you were working on and where you left off. This should be verbatim to ensure there's no drift in task interpretation.

Here's an example of how your output should be structured:

<example>
<analysis>
[Your thought process, ensuring all points are covered thoroughly and accurately]
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   [Detailed description]

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - [Concept 1]
   - [Concept 2]
   - [...]

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - [File Name 1]
      - [Summary of why this file is important]
      - [Summary of the changes made to this file, if any]
      - [Important Code Snippet]
   - [File Name 2]
      - [Important Code Snippet]
   - [...]

4. Errors and fixes:
    - [Detailed description of error 1]:
      - [How you fixed the error]
      - [User feedback on the error if any]
    - [...]

5. Problem Solving:
   [Description of solved problems and ongoing troubleshooting]

6. All user messages: 
    - [Detailed non tool use user message]
    - [...]

7. Pending Tasks:
   - [Task 1]
   - [Task 2]
   - [...]

8. Current Work:
   [Precise description of current work]

9. Optional Next Step:
   [Optional Next step to take]

</summary>
</example>

Please provide your summary based on the conversation so far, following this structure and ensuring precision and thoroughness in your response. 

There may be additional summarization instructions provided in the included context. If so, remember to follow these instructions when creating the above summary. Examples of instructions include:
<example>
## Compact Instructions
When summarizing the conversation focus on typescript code changes and also remember the mistakes you made and how you fixed them.
</example>

<example>

When you are using compact - please focus on test output and code changes. Include file reads verbatim.

IMPORTANT: Do NOT use any tools. You MUST respond with ONLY the <summary>...</summary> block as your text output.

<analysis>
Let me chronologically analyze the conversation:

1. Initial plan was provided to remove NI (National Instruments) UI components and FlexCell grid from NoiseTest1 (신진) VB.NET WinForms project and replace with standard controls.

2. Project located at: `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\리크 검사기 신진&엔케이\신진\` but IDE uses `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\NoiseTest1\`

3. Team created with 3 agents (infra-agent, frmmain-agent, forms-agent) + build verification agent.

4. After agents completed, discovered the IDE path was different - had to copy files from Korean path to SHINJIN path.

5. User reported IDE build errors - massive list of AxCWUIControlsLib, ScatterPlot, XAxis, etc. still in FrmMain.Designer.vb. This was because files were modified at wrong path. Fixed by copying modified files.

6. User pointed out labels had no text. OcxState binary extraction was needed. Successfully extracted using CP949 encoding from 신진2's FrmMain.resx.

7. User requested all labels have BorderStyle = FixedSingle.

8. User requested graph caption font: Arial, bold, size 16. Changed in ClassZedGraph.vb.

9. User added CheckAmp checkbox to FrmSet for "1차 검사 패스" feature. Asked to:
   - Add DB column (FirstPass bit) to Table_SET
   - Add global variable _FirstPassEnabled
   - Wire up load/save in Module1.vb LoadSetData/SaveSetData
   - Wire up FrmSet.vb load/save with CheckAmp
   - Skip 1차 plunger current test in FrmMain.vb when enabled

10. User then requested OK/NG judgment labels: white text color unified, OK→BackColor Blue, NG→BackColor Red.

11. I was in the middle of implementing the OK/NG color changes when the summary was requested.

Key files modified:
- LeakTestMachine_신진1.vbproj - removed NI/FlexCell refs, added ZedGraph
- ClassZedGraph.vb - copied from converttp, modified title font
- Module1.vb - added _FirstPassEnabled, LoadSetData/SaveSetData updates
- FrmMain.Designer.vb - massive NI→standard control conversion
- FrmMain.vb - all NI API→standard API, added InitGraphs, FirstPass bypass logic
- FrmSet.vb - added CheckAmp load/save
- FrmPart, FrmSearch, FrmSearch2, FrmPassWord, FrmTest, FrmSeq, FrmSet, FrmSIgnal (Designer + code-behind)
- All .resx files - removed OcxState entries
- licenses.licx - cleared
- packages.config - created for ZedGraph

The DecideControl function and direct OK/NG assignments need to change from ForeColor-based to BackColor-based styling. I was about to implement this.

Current state of DecideControl (line 715 in FrmMain.vb):
```vb
Private Sub DecideControl(lValue As Label, lDecision As Label, sMin As Double, sMax As Double, mValue As Double)
```
Need to read this function and all OK/NG color assignments to change the pattern.

There are also PASS assignments for _FirstPassEnabled that were just added with ForeColor = Blue which need to change to BackColor = Blue, ForeColor = White.
</analysis>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   - Remove all NI (National Instruments) UI components (AxCWButton, ScatterGraph, NumericEdit) and FlexCell grid from the NoiseTest1 (신진) VB.NET WinForms project
   - Replace with standard .NET controls: Button, Label, Panel, ZedGraphControl, DataGridView, NumericUpDown
   - Keep NI DAQmx code intact (hardware data acquisition)
   - Add `CheckAmp` ("1차 검사 패스") feature: DB column + global variable + FrmSet save/load + FrmMain skip logic
   - Change OK/NG judgment label styling: white text color, OK→BackColor Blue, NG→BackColor Red

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - VB.NET WinForms Designer.vb / code-behind pattern
   - NI CW UI Controls (AxCWButton) — COM ActiveX with OcxState binary serialization
   - NI ScatterGraph → ZedGraph.ZedGraphControl replacement
   - FlexCell.Grid → DataGridView replacement
   - NI NumericEdit → NumericUpDown replacement
   - ClassZedGraph helper (InitGraph, DrawGraph, ClearGraph, SetXAxisRange)
   - Access MDB database with ADODB.Recordset
   - OcxState binary contains CP949-encoded Korean text for control labels
   - Two separate test flows in FrmMain.vb (1CELL vs multi-cell), both sharing wStep state machine
   - ZedGraph NuGet package 5.2.0, .NET Framework 4.8

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - **`C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\NoiseTest1\LeakTestMachine_신진1.vbproj`**
     - Removed FlexCell, NI UI (Common, UI, UI.WindowsForms, DAQmx.ComponentModel) references
     - Removed COMReference: AxCWUIControlsLib, CWUIControlsLib
     - Removed Imports: NationalInstruments, NationalInstruments.UI
     - Added ZedGraph reference with HintPath `..\packages\ZedGraph.5.2.0\lib\net35-Client\ZedGraph.dll`
     - Added ClassZedGraph.vb Compile item
     - NI Common reference was added back (needed for AnalogWaveform type used by DAQmx)
     - Kept: NationalInstruments.DAQmx reference

   - **`C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\NoiseTest1\ClassZedGraph.vb`**
     - Copied from `C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\converttp\ClassZedGraph.vb`
     - Modified title font from `Size=48, Family="굴림"` to `Size=16, Family="Arial"`, IsBold=True
     - Key methods: `InitGraph()`, `DrawGraph()`, `ClearGraph()`, `SetXAxisRange()`, `SetYAxisRange()`

   - **`C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\NoiseTest1\Module1.vb`**
     - Added global variable: `Public _FirstPassEnabled As Boolean`
     - `LoadSetData()`: Added Try-Catch reading `Rs.Fields("FirstPass").Value` into `_FirstPassEnabled`
     - `SaveSetData()`: Added Try-Catch writing `_FirstPassEnabled` to `Rs.Fields("FirstPass").Value`
     - DB connection: Access MDB at `BaseDirectory\DB\DB.mdb`, table `Table_SET`

   - **`C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\NoiseTest1\FrmMain.Designer.vb`** (~1617 lines after conversion, was ~3341)
     - All AxCWButton declarations changed to Button/Label/Panel by type
     - All ScatterGraph → ZedGraphControl (12 graphs)
     - Removed ScatterPlot, XAxis, YAxis, XYCursor, XYRangeAnnotation declarations
     - FlexCell.Grid (GridCount) → DataGridView
     - All OcxState/BeginInit/EndInit removed
     - Label texts set from OcxState extraction (e.g., "1차 PLUNGER 검사", "소음", "유량", etc.)
     - All Labels: `BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle`

   - **`C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\NoiseTest1\FrmMain.vb`** (~2650+ lines after modifications)
     - Added `InitGraphs()` subroutine with 12 ClassZedGraph.InitGraph calls
     - Changed `.OffText` → `.Text`, `.OffColor` → `.ForeColor`, `.ClearData()` → `ClassZedGraph.ClearGraph()`
     - Changed `PlotXYAppend` → `ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph`
     - Changed `ClickEvent` → `Click` in all Handles clauses
     - Changed `PortOpen()` parameter from AxCWButton to Panel, `.Value=True/False` → `.BackColor=Lime/Gray`
     - Changed `DecideControl()` parameter from AxCWButton to Label
     - `MeasureLabel` type: AxCWButton → Label; `MeasureGraph` type: ScatterGraph → ZedGraphControl
     - GridCount: FlexCell API → DataGridView API
     - **FirstPass bypass logic added at two locations:**
       - Flow 1 (line ~844): `If _FirstPassEnabled Then` → skip to wStep=75
       - Flow 2 (line ~1640): `If _FirstPassEnabled Then` → skip to wStep=100
       ```vb
       ElseIf wStep = 10 Then
           If _FirstPassEnabled Then
               WriteText(TextboxSystem, "1차 검사 패스")
               src1AmpDec.Text = "PASS"
               src1AmpDec.ForeColor = Color.Blue
               src1NoiseDec.Text = "PASS"
               src1NoiseDec.ForeColor = Color.Blue
               WriteText(TextboxSystem, "2차 검사 시작")
               wStep = 75  ' (or 100 for Flow 2)
           Else
               WriteText(TextboxSystem, "1차 검사 시작")
               wStep = 20
           End If
       ```
     - 1차 전류 판정 (wStep=73): checks src1Amp1~6 against _1AmpMin, sets src1AmpDec OK/NG
     - `DecideControl` function signature: `Private Sub DecideControl(lValue As Label, lDecision As Label, sMin As Double, sMax As Double, mValue As Double)`

   - **`C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\NoiseTest1\FrmSet.vb`**
     - Added `CheckAmp.Checked = _FirstPassEnabled` in FrmSet_Load
     - Added `_FirstPassEnabled = CheckAmp.Checked` in save handler (AxCWButton1_Click)
     - CheckAmp control added by user in Designer (text: "1차 검사 패스")

   - **`C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\SHINJIN\NoiseTest1\FrmSet.Designer.vb`**
     - User already added `CheckAmp` CheckBox (line 1147-1156), Font=Arial 15.75pt Bold

   - **Other forms modified** (FrmPart, FrmSearch, FrmSearch2, FrmPassWord, FrmTest, FrmSeq, FrmSet, FrmSIgnal):
     - AxCWButton → Button, FlexCell → DataGridView, NumericEdit → NumericUpDown
     - ClickEvent → Click, Value → CDbl/CInt conversion
     - Button Text set: 추가/삭제/저장/닫기/검색/확인/종료/설정 etc.

   - **packages.config** (created): ZedGraph 5.2.0, targetFramework=net48

   - **licenses.licx**: Cleared (all NI license entries removed)

   - **All .resx files**: OcxState/NI/FlexCell resource entries removed

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Wrong project path**: Agents modified `리크 검사기 신진&엔케이\신진\` but IDE uses `SHINJIN\NoiseTest1\`. Fixed by copying all modified files to SHINJIN path.
   - **NationalInstruments.Common reference missing**: DAQmx uses AnalogWaveform from NI.Common. Build agent added back the reference.
   - **Imports NationalInstruments missing**: Added in FrmMain.vb for AnalogWaveform type.
   - **InitControl() missing**: Was deleted during conversion but still called. Added empty stub.
   - **GridCount.Cell FlexCell API remnant**: Changed to DataGridView Columns.Add API.
   - **Label text missing**: AxCWButton stored text in OcxState binary (CP949 encoding). Extracted using PowerShell script scanning for CP949 Korean byte patterns from 신진2's original resx.
   - **User feedback on font sizes**: User manually fixed font sizes themselves, only asked for graph caption to be Arial Bold 16.
   - **User feedback on BorderStyle**: Requested all labels have `BorderStyle = FixedSingle`.

5. Problem Solving:
   - OcxState binary text extraction was complex. Tried UTF-16LE, BSTR format — failed. Successfully used CP949 byte-level scanning to extract Korean text from COM control binary state.
   - Two separate test flows in FrmMain.vb identified (1CELL vs multi-cell) with different skip targets (wStep=75 vs wStep=100).
   - OK/NG color styling change is pending (currently uses ForeColor, needs to change to BackColor + white ForeColor).

6. All user messages:
   - "Implement the following plan: [detailed NI/FlexCell removal plan]"
   - "나는 왜 빌드가 ide 에서 안되지 다시 확인해봐라" (why doesn't build work in IDE)
   - [Massive error list from IDE build at SHINJIN\NoiseTest1\ path]
   - "라벨의 텍스트느 모르는건가" (don't you know the label text?)
   - "offtext 가져오면 됨" (just get OffText)
   - "힘들면 그냥 기존 프로그램 스크린샷 줄까" (want me to give you a screenshot?)
   - "모든 라벨의 borderstyle 은 fixedsingle 로" (all labels BorderStyle = FixedSingle)
   - "글자 크기들은 좀 안 맞아서 내가 다 수정했고, 그래프 상단 캡션 폰트 arial 굵게 크기는 16으로 적용" (I fixed font sizes myself, apply graph caption font Arial bold 16)
   - "frmset에 CheckFirstPass 추가해놨음. frmmain 시작할떄 frmset 에서 사용하는 디비에 컬럼 하나 추가하고(bit) 저장/수정하는 코드에 반영 해주고, frmset 추가된 항목으로 저장/수정 하게 해주고, 체크시에 최초 플런지 전류검사하는 부분 패스되게 해줘"
   - "ok ng 판정부에 글자 색깔은 하얀색 통일 / ok 이면 backcolor blue / NG 이면 red 로" (OK/NG judgment: white text, OK→BackColor Blue, NG→BackColor Red)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - **OK/NG judgment color change**: Change from ForeColor-based to BackColor-based styling across all judgment labels in FrmMain.vb. Need to modify:
     - `DecideControl()` function
     - Direct src1AmpDec/src1NoiseDec OK/NG assignments (4 places - 2 flows × 2 judgment blocks)
     - PASS assignments for _FirstPassEnabled (2 places)
     - InitControl() default color reset
   - **DB column addition**: Table_SET needs `FirstPass` (bit) column added when DB.mdb is available. Code handles missing column via Try-Catch.
   - **Sync modified files** to both paths (SHINJIN and Korean path)

8. Current Work:
   Was implementing the user's request: "ok ng 판정부에 글자 색깄은 하얀색 통일 / ok 이면 backcolor blue / NG 이면 red 로"
   
   Just completed a Grep to find all OK/NG judgment-related code in FrmMain.vb. The results show:
   - `DecideControl()` function at line 715 — needs `.ForeColor = Color.White` + `.BackColor = Color.Blue/Red`
   - Direct assignments at lines 1136-1150 (Flow 1 wStep=73) and 1942-1956 (Flow 2 wStep=73)
   - PASS assignments at lines 848-851 and 1654-1657
   - InitControl() color resets at lines 280-323
   
   Need to read the DecideControl function body and modify all these locations.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Read `DecideControl` function (line 715 in FrmMain.vb) and modify it plus all direct OK/NG/PASS color assignments to use:
   - `lDecision.ForeColor = Color.White` (always)
   - OK/PASS: `lDecision.BackColor = Color.Blue`
   - NG: `lDecision.BackColor = Color.Red`
   
   Per user's exact request: "ok ng 판정부에 글자 색깔은 하얀색 통일 / ok 이면 backcolor blue / NG 이면 red 로"
</summary>
